name: ApplicationStartupConfigFlow
steps: 3. Missing AppSetting rows inserted with default values
4. First Get() call loads all settings into cache
5. All services receive config via DI-injected IApplicationSettingService

name: AdminSettingEditFlow
steps: 2. GetUncached() called for each AppSetting to show live values
4. Save(setting, newValue) called → DB upsert + cache invalidated
5. All subsequent Get() calls see new value

name: FileUploadValidationFlow
steps: 1. File upload received (profile storage or import)
4. If null: reject with 'FileType not supported' error
5. If found: FileTypeId stored with file metadata in ProfileStorageFiles
